summary: Tested Site-Wide Beta Mode feature. Backend APIs all working (9/9 tests passed). Fixed critical bug: missing X icon import in AdminDashboard.jsx. Admin dashboard beta toggle UI working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing X icon import in AdminDashboard.jsx - was causing 'ReferenceError: X is not defined' when displaying email whitelist
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site-Wide Beta Mode feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /site-beta-status (public), GET /check-beta-access (auth), PUT /admin/beta-settings (admin). Frontend: AdminDashboard has site beta toggle with message input and email whitelist. BetaAccessRequired page shows for non-whitelisted users when beta is enabled. Admin users always bypass beta mode.

admin_dashboard_beta_toggle.details: Site-Wide Beta Mode toggle visible in Beta Mode Settings section, shows/hides message and email list when toggled

add_email_to_whitelist.details: Can add emails via input field and Add button, emails appear in list with X remove button

remove_email_from_whitelist.details: X button removes email from whitelist (after fixing missing X icon import)

save_beta_settings.details: Save Beta Settings button saves all settings to backend

admin_bypass_beta.details: Admin users can access admin dashboard even when site beta is enabled

beta_access_required_page.details: BetaAccessRequired.jsx has correct UI: Lock icon, Private Beta title, custom message, Check Again button, Sign Out button

backend_endpoints.details: All 9 backend tests passed: site-beta-status, check-beta-access, admin/beta-settings GET/PUT, email whitelist add/remove

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing X icon import from lucide-react
bugs_fixed.fix: Added X to the import statement
bugs_fixed.impact: Was causing runtime error when displaying email whitelist with remove buttons
